title: onobrychis arenaria subsp. miniata
intro: Onobrychis arenaria subsp. miniata, also known as Persian clover or red clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis arenaria subsp. miniata include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
